const name='Ben'; const cbs=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid="participantCheckBox"]')); const match=cbs.find(cb=>{ const li=cb.closest('li'); const lbl=li&&li.querySelector('[data-testid="participantLabel"]'); return lbl&&lbl.innerText.includes(name); }); match&&!match.checked&&match.click(); return match ? 'CLICKED' : (name ? 'NOT_FOUND' : 'SKIP');
